name: CMP_FEEDBACK_VL
query: SELECT B.FEEDBACK_ID, B.PLAN_ID, B.RATING_ENABLED_FLAG, T.RATING_INSTRUCTION, T.QUESTION1, T.QUESTION2, T.QUESTION3, T.QUESTION4, T.QUESTION5, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID FROM CMP_FEEDBACK_B B, CMP_FEEDBACK_TL T WHERE B.FEEDBACK_ID = T.FEEDBACK_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
